headline: Michael Burry Saying Anthropic Eating Palantir's Lunch Is 'The Wrong Take And Fictional Narrative,' Says Top Analyst
summary: On Thursday, Wedbush Securities analyst Dan Ives dismissed statements made by famed investor Michael Burry that Anthropic is overtaking Palantir Technologies. Ives Rejects Burry's Anthropic Vs Palantir Narrative "We believe the take that Anthropic is eating PLTR's lunch … is the wrong take and fictional narrative," Ives said, adding that Palantir remains "at the epicenter of leaders in the AI Revolution" and a "Core AI winner and tech leader."
